final:
module top_module(
	input clk,
	input L,
	input r_in,
	input q_in,
	output reg Q);always @ (posedge clk) begin
        case (L)
            1'b0 : Q <= q_in;
            1'b1 : Q <= r_in;
        endcase    
    end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      Q <= ~q_in;
      Q <= ~r_in;
    end
  end

endmodule
